copy.preview: Not a destination. A process. Every child's timeline is different, here's what "progress" looks like when you're building body awareness, not compliance.

sections.name: Lena Sign-Off (Medium — Phase 3 Variant)
sections.content:
With understanding,

Lena ——
Customer Support · Mom of two autistic sons

P.S. Both my sons went through this. The older one was almost 8 before he initiated on his own. The prompting felt endless. But the pathways were forming the whole time, I just couldn't see them yet. Keep going at your child's pace. [link to 3+3 Bundle]

---

### Source Citations Used

| Claim | Source | Confidence |
|-------|--------|------------|
| Autistic children have reduced body awareness for body signals | Nicholson et al. (2019), J Autism Dev Disord, 49(9):3625-3637 | HIGH |
| Prompting builds compliance, not body awareness (prompt-dependency) | 04-mechanism-positioning.md §3.2; 15-level-messaging-matrix.md §3 | — |
| Body-Signal Learning Layer provides 30-60s gentle sensation that lasts | 04-mechanism-positioning.md §4.1 | — |
| "He initiated. Once. After 4 years." — verbatim parent language | 05-customer-language-bank.md #109 | Very High |
| "BCBA protocol got us to 'sit on the toilet without melting down.' That's it." | 05-customer-language-bank.md §B2 | High |
| E4 covers building independence / reducing prompting | 2-full-email-copy-strategy.md §1.19 L1-E4 line 960 | S2 Strategy |
| 6-Element Formula: mechanism specificity over brand promises | MASTER-DIAGNOSIS-COMPENDIUM.md §6.1 (V11) | — |

why.raw:
label: "Why we chose this story",
      body: "Sarah isn't our best case. She's our most common one. Her situation is close to what many families find — a child on the spectrum, a couple of years of tried methods, a low point that felt like an ending, and then a method that finally matched the map.",

covered.raw:
label: "What's covered",
      items: [
        "Your child refusing to wear them — full refund.",
        "No visible progress in 60 days — full refund.",
        "A regression during the trial period — full refund.",
        "Any reason at all you decide it's not the right fit — full refund.",
      ],
